title: Brand Design Spec
description: Structured design specification extracted from a brand URL. Merges CSS-extracted data (ground truth for hex values), Vision AI observations (ground truth for design strategy), and computed fields (derived from the above). Consumed by generate-design-tokens.js and build-course.js.

colors.description: Brand color primitives — extracted hex values from the brand's actual CSS, not generated.

background.description: Dominant page background color. Source: CSS extraction (most frequent section backgroundColor).

backgroundAlt.description: Alternate background for visual rhythm. Source: CSS extraction (2nd most frequent backgroundColor) or computed (slight step from background).

primary.description: Primary accent color — the brand's signature color. Source: CSS extraction (top accent color from interactive elements). Preserved exact hex, never MD3-transformed.

secondary.description: Secondary accent color, or null if the brand uses a single accent. Source: CSS extraction (2nd accent color).

onPrimary.description: Text/icon color used ON the primary accent. Source: computed from primary luminance (dark primary → #ffffff, light primary → #1a1a1a).

onBackground.description: Primary text color on the main background. Source: CSS extraction (most frequent paragraph/heading text color).

cardSurface.description: Card/container background color. Source: CSS extraction from card elements, cross-validated by Vision AI.

cardBorder.description: Card border color, or null if cards have no borders. Source: CSS extraction from card elements.

primarySource.description: Records where the primary color value came from for auditability. 'css' = CSS extraction accentColors, 'dembrandt' = dembrandt design token extraction, 'fallback' = gray default. Source: computed during three-source cascade in computeCssDerivedSpec().

colorStrategy.description: HOW the brand applies its colors — the application rules that prevent incorrect color usage. Source: Vision AI structured audit.

accentSectionBg.description: Does the brand use its accent/primary color as full-width section backgrounds? Source: Vision AI Q1.

cardsOnAccentBg.description: When accent sections appear, does content sit in cards/containers (true) or directly on the color (false)? Only meaningful when accentSectionBg is true. Source: Vision AI Q2.

primaryForIcons.description: Is the primary accent color used for icons? Source: Vision AI Q4.

primaryForStatNumbers.description: Is the accent color used to highlight statistics or key numbers? Source: Vision AI Q5.

primaryForButtons.description: Is the primary accent color used for button backgrounds? Source: Vision AI Q4.

textDirectlyOnAccent.description: Does body text appear directly on accent backgrounds (without a card container)? False means only headings/stats may appear on accent, body text needs a neutral card. Source: Vision AI Q3.

accentSectionFrequency.description: How often accent-colored sections appear. 0 = never, 2 = every 2nd section, 3 = every 3rd, etc. Source: Vision AI Q6.

typography.description: Typography character and weights — a mix of Vision AI observation (character) and CSS extraction (weights).

headlineCharacter.description: Visual character of headline typography. Source: Vision AI Q8.

bodyCharacter.description: Visual character of body text. Source: Vision AI Q8.

headlineWeight.description: Average CSS font-weight of heading elements. Source: CSS extraction.

bodyWeight.description: Average CSS font-weight of paragraph elements. Source: CSS extraction.

uppercaseHeadings.description: Are headings displayed in uppercase? Source: Vision AI Q9, cross-validated with CSS text-transform.

shape.description: Shape language — borders, radii, shadows. Primarily from CSS extraction with Vision AI providing surface style.

borderRadius.description: Dominant corner treatment. Mapped from CSS dominantBorderRadius: 0-4px=sharp, 5-12px=rounded, 13px+=pill. Source: CSS extraction.

borderWidth.description: Border presence and weight on cards/buttons. Source: CSS extraction.

shadowDepth.description: Shadow treatment. Mapped from CSS dominantShadow. Source: CSS extraction.

surfaceStyle.description: Overall surface treatment style. Source: Vision AI Q7.

imageStyle.description: Photography/image treatment observed on the brand site. Source: Vision AI Q10-Q11.

treatment.description: Overall image/photography treatment. Source: Vision AI Q10.

colorTemp.description: Dominant color temperature of photography. Source: Vision AI Q11.

contrast.description: Overall visual contrast level — considers text-to-background contrast, color intensity, and whether the design uses high-contrast pairings or muted/low-contrast treatments. Source: Vision AI Q13.

pairingLogic.description: Which foreground color is used on which background. Prevents the invisible-icon problem. Source: computed from extracted color pairs.

background.description: Foreground color key for main background. Value is a key name from colors (e.g., 'onBackground').

primary.description: Foreground color key for primary accent background. Value is a key name from colors (e.g., 'onPrimary').

cardSurface.description: Foreground color key for card surfaces. Value is a key name from colors (e.g., 'onBackground').

accentSectionBg.description: Foreground color key for accent section backgrounds. Value is a key name from colors (e.g., 'onPrimary').

applicationConstraints.description: Governance rules observed from the brand — things the engine must NEVER do. Source: Vision AI Q14.

items.description: A 'never' rule, e.g., 'Never place body text directly on accent backgrounds'.

archetype.description: Visual archetype classification. Drives SHAPE (borders, radii, shadows, spacing) via visual-archetypes.json recipes. Source: Vision AI Q12.

isDark.description: Whether the brand uses a dark background as its dominant theme. Source: CSS extraction (scroll-sampled luminance detection). Vision AI isDark is cross-validated but CSS is ground truth.
